metadata.defaultTitle: Instituto Impetus — Impact, education and entrepreneurship
metadata.defaultDescription: An organization committed to social impact, education and entrepreneurship. Official sponsor of the Favela + Rica event.

hero.title: Education transforms lives.
hero.subtitle: A life that changes, changes others. We support people who are already walking the path — at the moment when the right support is what's missing to reach where they're already capable of going.

home.aboutBody: When someone learns, something changes forever. Instituto Impetus exists for the moment when one's own strength is no longer enough — so each person can reach what they're already capable of achieving. We don't see lack: we see potential.
home.quoteLine: We don't see lack. We see potential.
home.eventTagline: Education and Entrepreneurship in the Communities
home.impactLead: The capacity is already there. The Institute removes what's keeping it from being realized.
home.ctaTitle: Results begin with the right support.
home.ctaLead: Companies, foundations and individuals — talk to us about contributing, proposing partnerships or learning more about the projects.

about.title: The support that makes the difference — at the moment when the difference can still be made.
about.lead: Instituto Impetus exists because education transforms lives. We support those who are already walking — at the moment when moving forward becomes a challenge.

lines: There are people already walking. Who have already studied, already tried, already proven what they're capable of.
And still, at some point, they need a hand. Not because they faltered — but because some paths are harder for some than for others.
We don't see lack. We see potential.
We believe in what you're still going to achieve. And we're here for that.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: When someone learns, something changes permanently — in the person, in their family, in the generations that follow. We exist for the moment when one's own strength is no longer enough. Through education, we help people reach what they're already capable of achieving.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: A Brazil where education fulfills its promise — to open real possibilities for every person. Where those who walk don't have to stop for lack of support. Where the transformation that begins in one individual reaches families, communities and generations.

items.title: Wholeness
items.body: We see the whole person. Before offering a solution, we observe what is actually preventing progress — because the obstacle is rarely the obvious one.

items.title: Concrete action
items.body: Results are what matter. Words inspire, communication brings transparency — but what counts is who arrived.

items.title: Listening before solving
items.body: We don't arrive with ready-made answers. We listen to what each person, each initiative, each situation actually needs — before proposing anything.

items.title: Courage to propose what's needed
items.body: Impetus is in the name. Doing what needs to be done, even when it's not the easiest or most obvious path, is part of who we are.

items.title: Love as foundation
items.body: We act from genuine care for people — not as strategy, as essence. Without it, nothing works.

differentiation.title: We start from the person, not from the service.
differentiation.body: While most organizations start from a service and look for an audience, we start from the person and find what they need. Support has no fixed form: we look at the whole human being, act on what is actually in the way and, through education, transform lives.

projects.title: Where education transforms lives.
projects.lead: Different entry points, the same principle: see the whole person and act on what is actually in the way.

magistraturaNegra.title: Magistratura Negra
magistraturaNegra.body: Comprehensive support for Black candidates to the Brazilian Judiciary and Public Prosecutor's Office. 21 approved students — 11 already at the final destination, 10 won prestigious stepping-stone exams.

favelaRica.title: Favela + Rica
favelaRica.body: Large-scale event connecting community entrepreneurs with resources, markets and opportunities. Two intense days in Rio de Janeiro dedicated to education and entrepreneurship.

aprenderComImpetus.title: Aprender com Impetus
aprenderComImpetus.body: Pioneer project supporting public-school children with learning difficulties — psychological and speech therapy support, plus the space they need to learn.

magistraturaNegra.title: Magistratura Negra
magistraturaNegra.lead: Comprehensive support for Black candidates who reached the final stretch of the exam for the Brazilian Judiciary and Public Prosecutor's Office — so they can reach where they're already capable of going.

feature.title: The first Black quilombola prosecutor in Brazil.
feature.name: Dr. Kalorine Bezerra Maia
feature.body: A student of the project, she is the first Black quilombola woman approved for the Public Prosecutor's Office in the country. A trajectory of recognized capacity — and of the kind of support that makes the difference at the decisive moment.

screen1.title: For Brazil, achievements. For them, steps.
screen1.body: The goal of the Magistratura Negra Project is to prepare and support candidates to reach the positions of Judge and Public Prosecutor. Along the way, many students win approvals in highly competitive exams — with excellent pay, prestige and stability. These are positions that, for the vast majority of Brazilians, already represent a great professional and personal victory. But for these students, they are just one stage of the journey.

screen2.title: 10 approvals in stepping-stone exams.
screen2.lead: After joining the project, our students won approvals in exams that already let us say these people have made it — but they stay because the dream is still to reach the final destination.

results.title: 21 approved. 11 already at the destination.
results.lead: For each one, a different path. For the Institute, always the same principle: see the whole person and act on what is actually in the way.

items.label: in the Judiciary and Public Prosecutor's Office

gallery.title: Victories with names and faces.
gallery.lead: Photos from the project and the students who won their approvals.

events.title: Favela + Rica 2026.
events.tagline: Education and Entrepreneurship in the Communities
events.body: A two-day, large-scale event focused on education, income generation and entrepreneurship in communities across the state of Rio de Janeiro.

video.title: Watch the invitation
video.fallback: Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

about.title: About the event
paragraphs: FAVELA + RICA is a two-day, large-scale event focused on education, income generation and entrepreneurship in communities across the state of Rio de Janeiro.

More than an event, it is a hands-on development experience — connecting knowledge, mentorship and real opportunities for those who want to transform lives through education and for those who want to start or grow a business.

Both days feature high-level talks and case studies. Day 1 also gathers proposals on education from presidential candidates. Throughout the weekend there are stands, workshops, actions against violence toward women and, on Saturday, free general health and eye exams.

day1.label: Day 1
day1.lead: Talks and proven education projects, plus presidential candidates' proposals on the topic — no debate, only their proposals.
audience: Principals and administrators of public and private schools
delivers: Access to talks, bookstore and exhibitions
Cash voucher to buy books of their choice
day1.highlight: 2 Technology, AI and Robotics Centers for public schools — R$ 150,000 each, including teacher training.

day2.label: Day 2
day2.lead: High-impact talks and real stories from people who made it — inspiration and practical knowledge.
audience: People who own or want to start their own business
delivers: Access to talks, bookstore and exhibitions
Cash voucher to buy books of their choice
Full online post-event courses with full scholarship

highlights.title: 20 capital kits
highlights.body: R$ 100,000 split across 20 entrepreneurs — 12 kits of R$ 3K, 5 of R$ 5K, one of R$ 9K, one of R$ 10K and one of R$ 20K.

highlights.title: Full post-event support
highlights.body: Full course scholarships, consulting, networking, and pro-bono support from lawyers, mentors and experienced entrepreneurs.

benefits.title: Financial benefits
benefits.lead: Financial benefits work as incentive and continuity. The core of the project is knowledge, support network and social transformation.

items.title: Bookstore
items.body: Distributed across 6,000 attendees to purchase books of their choice.

items.title: Technology Centers
items.body: Draw of 2 Technology, AI and Robotics Centers for public schools.

items.title: Capital kits
items.body: Split across 20 entrepreneurs — from R$ 3K to R$ 20K each.

items.title: Home renovation
items.body: Draw for a home renovation in the favela.

bookstore.title: Bookstore
bookstore.body: Over 12,000 titles on education, entrepreneurship, classics and children's books. Every attendee receives a cash envelope to buy books of their choice.

association.label: A+E2+F+
association.title: Association of Favela Educators and Entrepreneurs
association.body: Launching at the event. Built to provide continuity, community and networking among teachers and entrepreneurs. Free and optional membership for every attendee.

actions.title: Social actions
actions.lead: Three high-impact tracks with free stands and services during the event.

axes.label: Track 1
axes.title: Favela + Health
axes.body: With REDE TOTAL CARE: quick check-up — blood pressure, glucose, BMI and oximetry. With IBAP and CLINOP: free eye exams — glaucoma, fundoscopy and visual acuity.

axes.label: Track 2
axes.title: Women's Rights
axes.body: With the City of Rio / Municipal Secretariat for Women: technical team (psychologist and social worker), workshops and materials from Projeto Tem Saída.

axes.label: Track 3
axes.title: Internationalization and Cultural Exchange
axes.body: Two guest speakers from Angola, bringing an international perspective to the conversation.
